component.name: LinkedIn MCP Server
component.summary: MCP server for LinkedIn profile, company, and job scraping

description.p: LinkedIn MCP Server is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that lets AI assistants such as Claude interact with LinkedIn. It drives a Chromium browser session to scrape profiles, company pages, job listings, and the LinkedIn feed on behalf of the authenticated user.

ul.li: Person profile scraping with configurable section selection
Company profile and employee listing extraction
Job search and detailed job listing retrieval
Secure credential storage with persistent browser session

description.p: The server speaks the MCP protocol over stdio or HTTP and can be integrated with any MCP-compatible AI client.
